goal: Add rate limiting to the API and verify it with tests

subtasks.title: Design the rate-limiting middleware
subtasks.dod: The per-IP/per-user limit policy is documented

subtasks.title: Config values and header output
subtasks.dod: Retry-After and X-RateLimit-* headers are returned

subtasks.title: Unit tests for rate limiting
subtasks.dod: Request behavior around the threshold is verified by tests

subtasks.title: Add integration tests
subtasks.dod: Rate limiting is active on the main API endpoints

risk_notes: Without a shared cache, limits may diverge across instances
